name: Messenger.GeneralModel
comment:
# General Model

General model is designed to be an abstract interface of scenes, layers, components, game components, etc..

  - a: data type
  - b: environment type
  - c: init type
  - d: message type
  - e: render type

@docs NamedGeneralModel, NamelessGeneralModel

aliases.name: NamedGeneralModel
aliases.comment:
Named General Model.

This has a name field.
aliases.type: { name : String.String, data : a, init : b -> c -> a, update : b -> d -> a -> ( a, b ), view : b -> a -> e }

aliases.name: NamelessGeneralModel
aliases.type: { data : a, init : b -> c -> a, update : b -> d -> a -> ( a, b ), view : b -> a -> e }

name: Messenger.Recursion

aliases.name: RecBody
aliases.comment:
RecBody type.

Pass this as an argument to the updater
aliases.type: { update : Messenger.Recursion.Updater a b c d, match : Messenger.Recursion.Matcher a d, super : Messenger.Recursion.Super d }

name: Messenger.RecursionArray

values.name: updateObjects
values.comment: Recursively update all the objects in the List
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.RecBody a b c d -> c -> b -> Array.Array a -> ( Array.Array a, List.List b, c )

name: Messenger.RecursionList

values.name: updateObjects
values.comment: Recursively update all the objects in the List
values.type: Messenger.Recursion.RecBody a b c d -> c -> b -> List.List a -> ( List.List a, List.List b, c )
